---
title: "Snake Roadmap"
---

[← Gallery](../gallery.html)

::: {.timeline .snake .tl-label-banner .tl-dotted}
::: {.event data-label="Q1" style="--tl-color-label: #6366f1; --tl-color-dot: #6366f1;"}
**Discovery**
Requirements gathering and stakeholder interviews. Define scope, constraints, and success criteria.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Q2" style="--tl-color-label: #0891b2; --tl-color-dot: #0891b2;"}
**Design**
Wireframes, prototypes, and design system setup. Validate with users before moving to build.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Q3" style="--tl-color-label: #059669; --tl-color-dot: #059669;"}
**Build**
Development sprints with continuous integration. Weekly demos to keep stakeholders aligned.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Q4" style="--tl-color-label: #dc2626; --tl-color-dot: #dc2626;"}
**Launch**
Staged rollout, monitoring, and structured feedback collection. Retrospective at end of quarter.
:::
:::

`.snake` with `.tl-label-banner` and `.tl-dotted`. Per-event colors are set inline on each event.

````markdown
::: {.timeline .snake .tl-label-banner .tl-dotted}
::: {.event data-label="Q1" style="--tl-color-label: #6366f1; --tl-color-dot: #6366f1;"}
**Discovery**
Requirements gathering and stakeholder interviews.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Q2" style="--tl-color-label: #0891b2; --tl-color-dot: #0891b2;"}
**Design**
Wireframes, prototypes, and design system setup.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Q3" style="--tl-color-label: #059669; --tl-color-dot: #059669;"}
**Build**
Development sprints with continuous integration.
:::
::: {.event data-label="Q4" style="--tl-color-label: #dc2626; --tl-color-dot: #dc2626;"}
**Launch**
Staged rollout, monitoring, and feedback collection.
:::
:::
````
